name: UBA : User Access to Internal Server from Jump Server
notes: Detect when user uses a jump server to access the VPN or internal servers.
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when any of Source IP are contained in any of UBA : Jump Servers - IP
when any of Destination IP are contained in any of UBA : Internal Servers - IP
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success
